creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
This is a composite pronounciation dictionary from ogi.edu, for use with
Festival. It depends on the festival (ports/21182) and festlex-poslex
(ports/21186) ports. This is based on the NetBSD port.  Please retain the
line saying so, and the $NetBSD$ RCS tags, when committing it.

Fix: 

http://jpj.net/~trevor/freebsd/ports/festlex-oald.shar
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
